name: cvpr-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for CVPR submissions: venue fit at 16k-submission scale, OpenReview submission audits, the one-page rebuttal, mandatory reviewer duties for authors, the Compute Reporting Form, supplementary videos, benchmark-grade experiments, and CVF open-access / IEEE Xplore camera-ready work. Grounded in official CVPR 2026 pages checked on 2026-07-08.
